def positive_socket_opened_without_context_manager_or_guaranteed_close():
    rule_id = "socket_opened_without_context_manager_or_guaranteed_close"
    family = "boundaries"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "socket.socket opened without a context manager or explicit .close() in a finally block."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
